changelog: Redesigned purchase orders: one document from request through to order, with a clear status ribbon and step-by-step action buttons
Vendor order pad — pick a supplier and their products load in automatically with suggested reorder quantities you can adjust or remove
Receiving and billing progress now shown separately from the order status, so a part-delivered order reads correctly at a glance
Fixed Send to Supplier, which previously did nothing once an order was approved
Purchase orders under a configurable amount can now skip approval
